infoPlist.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: AvoCook requires calendar access because it shares the same system component as reminders, which are used for your grocery lists.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsFullAccessUsageDescription: AvoCook requires calendar access because it shares the same system component as reminders, which are used for your grocery lists.
infoPlist.NSRemindersUsageDescription: AvoCook uses your reminders to export and synchronize your grocery lists.
infoPlist.NSRemindersFullAccessUsageDescription: AvoCook uses your reminders to export and synchronize your grocery lists.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Allow access to photos to add an image to a recipe.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Allow saving recipe images if needed.
infoPlist.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: Allow local network access only to connect to a Nextcloud server hosted on your network.
